subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I'd be glad to set up an introductory call. I'm available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Please let me know which slot works best for you.

I can't share internal contact details or directory information, but I'm happy to help coordinate the right next step through this thread.

Best,
Agent
